economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 25x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
falsifiers: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADBE, including Digital Media and Document Cloud owner cash, Digital Experience engine, Firefly AI monetization option, net financial claims, and AI competition reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 427.0M per ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm; inputs.shares_millions in valuation.json.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Segment engines value revenue-weighted owner cash once; Firefly option is a separate milestone band; net financial claims and AI reserve use unique overlap keys. Consolidated free cash flow is not double-counted across segments.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for subscription software compounder.

component_groups.label: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner-cash engine
component_groups.valuation_basis: Revenue-weighted owner cash capitalization on Creative Cloud and Acrobat.
component_groups.adjustments: Publishing segment cash embedded in residual allocation.

component_groups.label: Digital Experience Cloud owner-cash engine
component_groups.valuation_basis: Revenue-weighted owner cash capitalization on enterprise marketing stack.
component_groups.adjustments: Competitive share shifts versus Salesforce and Google reflected in multiple band.

component_groups.label: Firefly and generative-AI monetization option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value beyond segment capitalization multiples.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base free cash flow path; bull sensitivity only.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Generative-AI credit monetization and ARPU lift over 3 to 7 years; Firefly embedded in Creative Cloud since September 2023.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 RPO $22.5B and subscription mix; Adobe does not disclose standalone Firefly revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental generative-AI model training and inference spend embedded in consolidated R&D and cost of revenue.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.valuation_basis: Cash $5.43B less long-term debt $6.21B with operating liquidity reserve.
component_groups.adjustments: January 2025 note offering adds leverage for buybacks.

component_groups.label: Generative-AI competition and stock-based compensation reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Generative-AI competition and stock-based compensation reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve for seat churn, SBC dilution, and multiple compression.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Digital Media and Document Cloud owner-cash engine
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADBE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260115_rpt20251128_acc0000796343_26_000003.htm: FY2025 revenue $23769.0M, Digital Media $17650.0M, Digital Experience $5860.0M, OCF $10031.0M, FCF $9852.0M, RPO $22520.0M, cash $5431.0M, debt $6210.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Publishing segment cash embedded in residual allocation.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Firefly milestone band and AI competition reserve remain widest judgment components.
